title: Dashlane vs Okta
description: Compare Dashlane vs Okta in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right security & compliance tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Dashlane emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Dashlane or Okta?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Dashlane edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Dashlane excels at Dashlane is a security & compliance platform that helps Consumers and Enterprise, while Okta is stronger for Enterprise identity and access management platform..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Dashlane and Okta?
faqs.answer: Dashlane and Okta differ in pricing ($2.75 – $8/mo vs $2-15/user/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Dashlane cheaper than Okta?
faqs.answer: Dashlane starts at $2.75 – $8/mo while Okta starts at $2-15/user/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Dashlane or Okta?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for security & compliance. Dashlane scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Dashlane and Okta together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Dashlane or Okta?
faqs.answer: Both Dashlane and Okta prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which security & compliance tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Okta for large teams, while Dashlane may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $2.75 – $8/mo pricing.
